title: EncroChat handle attribution disputed with co-defendant bleed risk
offenceWording: Conspiracy to supply Class A drugs
mainIssue: The bundle refers to an encrypted handle but does not safely prove that the handle belongs to this defendant.
uncertainEvidence: whether the handle is personal, shared, or inferred from contact names
expectedTodayIssue: Treat handle attribution as disputed and ask the court to record that full attribution and extraction material remains outstanding.
expectedSummaryRisk: Do not treat a handle name or co-defendant reference as proof that the defendant sent the messages.
mustNotSay: co-defendant chat proves this defendant's role
polishOnlyWarnings: long encrypted-platform terminology may need simpler wording
